original: Nearly every single culture in the UGC (and some beyond) teaches its combatants to aim their weapons for center mass. The presence of breasts near this location makes for an attractive implant target, whether for protection or cosmetic enhancement. In this case, it’s both. Ballistic breast liners will significantly increase the user’s defense while at the same time ensuring they have an extra cup size of heft to show off at social events.\n\nA Paragon Inc. platinum best-seller!
